reason_for_decision: Strong end-to-end systems framing with clear timing logic, operational consequences, and testing guidance.
strengths: Treats latency as an end-to-end mission requirement rather than a narrow network metric.
Explains where delay accumulates across sensing, fusion, PTZ actuation, display, and human workflow.
Adds strong practical value through freshness logic, timestamp discipline, and full-path acceptance-testing guidance.
summary_assessment: A reviewer-safe systems article with good technical depth, clear control-room relevance, and concrete guidance for measuring and allocating latency budgets.
